info.name: JOD Dashboard API v1
info.description:
Complete API documentation for JOD Dashboard - Admin, Organization, and User endpoints.

**Base URL**: `http://localhost/api/v1`

**Authentication**: All endpoints require `auth:sanctum` token in `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header

**Response Contract**:
- Collections: `{ data: [], meta: { currentPage, perPage, total, lastPage }, message }`
- Single resource: `{ data: {}, message }`
- Mutations: `{ data: {...}, message }` or `204` for delete

**Query Parameters**:
- Pagination: `page` (default 1), `perPage` (default 20, max 100)
- Filters: `filter.fieldName=value`
- Sort: `sort=field` or `sort=-field` (Spatie style)
- Compatibility: Frontend `sortBy` keys auto-mapped server-side

item.name: Bootstrap & Profile
item.description: User profile, permissions, and dashboard context initialization

request.description:
Get current authenticated user's profile information for topbar/header.

**Response fields**: `id, name, email, phone, userType, organizationId?, organizationName?, status, createdAt, lastActiveAt`

Get current user's permission set for menu gating and action button visibility.

**Response fields**: `modules[], flat{ permissionName: boolean }, granted[]`

**Use for**: Sidebar visibility, button state, feature flags

Single-call dashboard initialization endpoint.

**Response includes**: `profile, permissions, counters (unread notifications, pending reviews, open reports)`

Get user profile for settings page.

**Response fields**: `name, email, phone?, verifiedFlags...`

Update current user's profile information.

**Body fields**: `name, email` (required), `phone?` (optional)

item.name: Admin - Overview & Analytics
item.description: Admin dashboard overview, KPIs, analytics, and audit logs

request.description:
Get admin dashboard KPI cards and recent activity feed.

**Response**: `stats[] { id, label, value, subLabel, icon }, activity[] { id, title, detail, at }`

Get KPI metrics for selected time range.

**Query parameters**: `range` (7d|30d|90d|12m)
**Response fields**: `kpis[] { id, label, value, changeVsLastMonth }`

Get weekly analytics for charts.

**Response fields**: `rows[] { weekLabel, visits, newUsers, donations }`

List audit logs with filters and pagination.

**Query parameters**:
- `page, perPage` (pagination)
- `filter.actorUserId` (user who performed action)
- `filter.action` (action type)
- `filter.from, filter.to` (date range)
- `sort` (at|-at)

**Response fields**: `{ id, action, user, at, entityType?, entityId?, metadata? }`

item.name: Admin - Users Management
item.description: List, create, update, and manage admin users

request.description:
List all users with filters and pagination.

**Supported sorts**: createdAt|-createdAt|name|-name|lastActiveAt|-lastActiveAt
**Response fields**: `{ id, name, email, phone, role, status, postsCount, reportsCount, createdAt, lastActiveAt }`

Create a new user. If password not provided, server generates invite/reset flow.

**Body fields**: `name, email, phone, role, status` (required), `password?` (optional)
Get full details of a specific user.

Update user information.

**Body fields**: `name, email, phone, role, status` (all optional)
Update user status (active|inactive).

Update user password.

**Validation**: min 8 chars, confirmPassword must match newPassword
Soft delete a user (status set to deleted, not removed from DB).

item.name: Admin - Organizations Management
item.description: List, view, and manage organizations including verification and acceptance

request.description:
List organizations with filters and pagination.

**Response fields**: `{ id, name, email, phone, location, verificationStatus, status, campaignsCount, postsCount, activeVolunteersCount, activityScore, createdAt, lastActiveAt }`

Get full organization details including documents and legal information.

**Additional fields**: `organizationType, registrationNumber, establishmentDate, shortAddress, description, licenseDocumentName, delegationDocumentName, ownerFullName, ownerEmail, ownerPhone, website?, socialMedia?, acceptedAt?`
Update organization profile fields.
Update organization status (active|inactive).
Update organization verification status (verified|unverified).
Accept organization - sets status=active, verificationStatus=verified, acceptedAt=now
Soft delete an organization.

item.name: Admin - Posts Review
item.description: Review and moderate user posts (help requests, job opportunities, etc.)

request.description:
List posts pending review.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, summary, organizationName, authorName, location, submittedAt, publishedAt, status, type, reviewedBy?, rejectionReason? }`
Get full post details for review.

Approve a post for publication.

**Body fields**: `note?` (optional)

Reject a post with reason.

**Body fields**: `reason` (required, min 8 characters)

List campaigns pending review.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, summary, organizationName, managerName, location, category, goalAmount, raisedAmount, beneficiariesCount, startDate, endDate, submittedAt, status, reviewedBy?, rejectionReason? }`
Get full campaign details for review.
Approve a campaign.

Reject a campaign with reason.

**Body fields**: `reason` (required, min 8 characters)

item.name: Admin - Reports Management
item.description: Manage user-submitted reports and moderation cases

request.description:
List reports with filters.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, description, status, severity, entityType, entityId, organizationName, reporterName, createdAt, assignee?, timeline[], evidence[] }`
Get full report details.

Claim/assign report (transition: new → in_progress).

**Body fields**: `assigneeId?` (optional)

Request additional information (transition: in_progress → waiting_response).

**Body fields**: `note?` (optional)

Close report (transition: in_progress|waiting_response → closed).

**Body fields**: `note?` (optional)
**Note**: Invalid transitions return 422

List notifications.

**Response fields**: `{ id, mailbox, title, body, category, recipientScope, recipientLabel, priority, status, createdAt, sentAt, readAt?, referenceLabel, referencePath, createdBy }`
Get notification details.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Platform Maintenance",
  "body": "The platform will be under maintenance on Saturday from 2-4 AM UTC",
  "category": "system",
  "recipientScope": "all",
  "recipientLabel": "All Users",
  "priority": "high"
}

request.description:
Create and send a notification.

**Body fields**: 
- `title, body, category, recipientScope, recipientLabel` (required)
- `priority?` (normal|high, optional)
Update notification read/unread state.
Resend a notification.
Delete a notification.

List badges (rewards system).

**Response fields**: `{ id, name, description, criteria, iconName, isActive, createdAt }`

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Helper Hero",
  "description": "Awarded for helping 10+ people in need",
  "criteria": "Provide assistance through help_request posts",
  "iconName": "heart-handshake",
  "isActive": true
}

request.description:
Create a new badge.

**Body fields**: `name, description, criteria, iconName, isActive` (required)
Get badge details.
Update badge information.
Update badge active status.
Delete a badge.

List articles.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, slug, excerpt, status, publishedAt?, createdAt, authorName }`

Create a new article.

**Body fields**: `title, excerpt, authorName, status` (required), `slug?` (optional - auto-slugified if empty)
Get article details.
Update article.
Delete an article.

Get platform settings.

**Response fields**: `siteName, allowNewPosts, requirePostReview`

Update platform settings.

**Body fields**: `siteName, allowNewPosts, requirePostReview`

Get organization dashboard overview.

**Response**: `stats[] { id, label, value, hint }, activity[] { id, title, detail, at }`

List reports submitted to organization (scoped to current org).

**Response fields**: `{ id, subject, summary, category, status, submittedAt, reporterLabel }`
Get organization report details.

List organization campaigns.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, summary, category, status, location, goalAmount, raisedAmount, beneficiariesCount, donorsCount, applicantsCount, startDate, endDate, createdAt, updatedAt, closedAt?, closedReason? }`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Healthcare Initiative 2025",
  "summary": "Providing healthcare services to underprivileged communities",
  "category": "health",
  "status": "draft",
  "location": "Amman, Jordan",
  "goalAmount": 50000,
  "beneficiariesCount": 500,
  "startDate": "2025-06-01",
  "endDate": "2025-12-31"
}

request.description:
Create a new campaign.

**Body fields**: `title, summary, category, status, location, goalAmount, beneficiariesCount, startDate, endDate` (required)
**Validation**: `startDate <= endDate`, `goalAmount >= 0`, `beneficiariesCount >= 0`
Get campaign details.
Update campaign information.

Close campaign (transition: active → closed).

**Body fields**: `reason` (required, min 8 characters)
Delete a campaign.

List organization posts.

**Response fields**: `{ id, title, summary, type, status, authorName, location, campaignTitle?, createdAt, updatedAt, publishedAt?, viewsCount, reactionsCount, applicationsCount }`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Job Opportunity: Healthcare Workers Needed",
  "summary": "We are seeking experienced healthcare professionals for our community health initiative",
  "type": "job_opportunity",
  "status": "draft",
  "authorName": "Healthcare Team",
  "location": "Amman, Jordan",
  "campaignTitle": "Healthcare Initiative 2025"
}

request.description:
Create a new post.

**Body fields**: `title, summary, type, status, authorName, location` (required), `campaignTitle?` (required for campaign-related types)
**Validation**: Campaign-related types require `campaignTitle` or `campaignId`
Get post details.
Update post information.
Publish a post (transition: draft → published).
Archive a post (transition: published → archived).
Restore an archived post (transition: archived → draft).
Delete a post.

item.name: Organization - Donors & Applicants
item.description: Manage organization donors and campaign applicants

request.description:
List donors for organization campaigns.

**Response fields**: `{ id, name, email, phone, campaignTitle, amountOrType, donatedAt, city?, source?, paymentMethod?, campaignRef?, assignedTo?, internalNotes? }`
Create/add a donor record.
Update donor information.
Delete a donor record.

List campaign applicants.

**Response shape**: Same as donors for now
Create/add an applicant record.
Update applicant information.
Delete an applicant record.

item.name: Organization - Staff & Roles
item.description: Manage organization staff members and roles with permissions

request.description:
List organization staff members.

**Response fields**: `{ id, name, email, role, invitedAt }`

Add a staff member to organization.

**Body fields**: `name, email, role` (required)
Update staff member role.
Remove staff member from organization.

List organization roles.

**Response fields**: `{ id, role, description, permissions[], updatedAt, isActive, isSystem?, membersCount }`

Create a custom organization role.

**Body fields**: `role, description, permissions[], isActive` (required)

Update role description and permissions.

**Body fields**: `description, permissions[], isActive`

Delete a custom role.

**Rules**:
- Cannot delete system roles (`isSystem=true`)
- Members of deleted role are reassigned to `viewer`

Get available permissions for role assignment.

**Purpose**: Source of selectable permissions for roles form

List organization notifications (scoped to current org).

**Same filters as admin notifications**

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Campaign Milestone",
  "body": "Your Healthcare campaign has reached 50% of the fundraising goal!",
  "category": "campaign",
  "recipientScope": "organizations",
  "recipientLabel": "Organization Members"
}

request.description: Create organization notification (optional by permission).
Mark notification as read/unread.
Resend an organization notification.
Delete an organization notification.

Get organization bank account settings.

**Response fields**: `bankName, iban`

Update organization bank account settings.

**Body fields**: `bankName, iban`

variable.description: Add your Sanctum bearer token here. Get it from login response or auth endpoint.
